items.title: westerdam — Maasdam_and_Westerdam_anchored_in_Half_Moon_Cay.JPG
items.author: Ahecht
items.credit_line: Photo by Ahecht via Wikimedia Commons (CC-BY-3.0)
items.notes:
MS Maasdam (left) and MS Westerdam (right) are anchored side by side off Half Moon Cay, Little San Salvador Island, Bahamas.  
<ul><li>They are both cruise ships belonging to Holland America Line.  One island tender is seen next to Westerda

items.credit_line: Photo by Phil13 via Wikimedia Commons (CC-BY-3.0)
items.notes: MS Westerdam heaving up its anchor in Half Moon Cay, Little San Salvador Island, Bahamas.  The Westerdam flies the Dutch flag and bears IMO number 9226891.
